stemHtml: If you are flying at the rear of the drag curve and your CAS decreases, what happens to the parasite, induced and total drag?

options.a: Parasite drag increases; Induced drag decreases; Total drag increases
options.b: Parasite drag decreases; Induced drag increases; Total drag decreases
options.c: Parasite drag increases; Induced drag decreases; Total drag decreases
options.d: Parasite drag decreases; Induced drag increases; Total drag increases
